status_line: Saturday afternoon. SARAH is mid-sweep right now. ATLAS ran this morning and confirmed the Gallery at 9.0/10 — production-ready. SCOUT found no new prospects today; Sonos is pivoting in-house, reducing AOR odds. The red board stands: LA Galaxy/Jacobi window expires today, Macy's is late, Glossier is 20+ days past. GUARDIAN remains offline — still blocking Sharpie client delivery. T2 Hybrid is locked at 4.7 stars and ready to go.
